name: skeleton
visual_summary: Skeleton is a loading state indicator that displays a placeholder for a UI element. It is suitable for when data is being loaded or processed, and should be used when a developer needs to provide feedback to the user that a feature is being fetched. Skeleton is often used as a placeholder for cards, lists, or other content that is loading.
generation_prompt:

Description: Skeleton is a loading state indicator that displays a placeholder for a UI element. It is suitable for when data is being loaded or processed, and should be used when a developer needs to provide feedback to the user that a feature is being fetched. Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
